opportunitiesData.title: Suppressors 5.56 NATO
opportunitiesData.fullParentPathName: JUSTICE, DEPARTMENT OF.FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION
opportunitiesData.description: The Federal Bureau of Investigation intends to procure 5.56 NATO suppressors. This is a commercial-item acquisition. The following FAR provisions and clauses apply: FAR 52.203-13; FAR 52.204-7; FAR 52.204-10; FAR 52.204-13; FAR 52.204-24; FAR 52.204-25; FAR 52.204-26; FAR 52.209-6; FAR 52.212-1; FAR 52.212-3; FAR 52.212-4; FAR 52.212-5; FAR 52.219-1; FAR 52.219-6 Notice of Total Small Business Set-Aside; FAR 52.219-8; FAR 52.219-28; FAR 52.222-3; FAR 52.222-19; FAR 52.222-21; FAR 52.222-26; FAR 52.222-35; FAR 52.222-36; FAR 52.222-50; FAR 52.225-1; FAR 52.225-13; FAR 52.232-33; FAR 52.233-1; FAR 52.233-3; FAR 52.233-4; FAR 52.243-1; FAR 52.246-2; FAR 52.247-34; FAR 52.249-8. This is a DOJ acquisition — DFARS does not apply.
